args.query: SELECT o.Id as OrderId, o.AccountId, o.EffectiveDate, oi.Product2Id, p.Name as ProductName FROM "Order" o JOIN OrderItem oi ON REPLACE(oi.OrderId,'#','') = REPLACE(o.Id,'#','') JOIN Product2 p ON REPLACE(p.Id,'#','') = REPLACE(oi.Product2Id,'#','') WHERE o.EffectiveDate >= '2021-06-01' AND o.EffectiveDate < '2021-07-01';

exec_args.sql: SELECT o.Id as OrderId, o.AccountId, o.EffectiveDate, oi.Product2Id, p.Name as ProductName FROM "Order" o JOIN OrderItem oi ON REPLACE(oi.OrderId,'#','') = REPLACE(o.Id,'#','') JOIN Product2 p ON REPLACE(p.Id,'#','') = REPLACE(oi.Product2Id,'#','') WHERE o.EffectiveDate >= '2021-06-01' AND o.EffectiveDate < '2021-07-01';

exec_args.sql: SELECT Id, AccountId, ContactId, CreatedDate, CloseDate FROM Opportunity WHERE REPLACE(ContactId,'#','') = '003Wt00000Jqy8SIAR' AND CAST(CloseDate AS DATE) >= DATE '2021-06-01' AND CAST(CloseDate AS DATE) < DATE '2021-07-01';

args.code:
import json, pandas as pd
contact = var_call_0o2IMPE2BG6qsCyybOwV9QQG[0]
acct = contact['AccountId'].replace('#','') if contact.get('AccountId') else None
orders = pd.DataFrame(var_call_ICDVXBX6oPmmHDdMH4faoKfM)
if not orders.empty:
    orders['AccountId_clean'] = orders['AccountId'].astype(str).str.replace('#','', regex=False)
    orders['Product2Id_clean'] = orders['Product2Id'].astype(str).str.replace('#','', regex=False)
    orders['ProductName_clean'] = orders['ProductName'].astype(str).str.strip()
    filt = orders[(orders['AccountId_clean']==acct) & (orders['ProductName_clean'].str.contains('AI', case=False, na=False))]
    prod_id = None
    if not filt.empty:
        # prefer exact AI processing unit-ish by choosing product with AI in name and earliest date in last month, stable
        filt = filt.sort_values(['EffectiveDate','ProductName_clean','Product2Id_clean'])
        prod_id = filt.iloc[0]['Product2Id_clean']
else:
    prod_id = None
result = prod_id
print('__RESULT__:')
print(json.dumps(result))

orders = pd.DataFrame(var_call_ICDVXBX6oPmmHDdMH4faoKfM)
if not orders.empty:
    orders['AccountId_clean'] = orders['AccountId'].astype(str).str.replace('#','', regex=False)
    orders['Product2Id_clean'] = orders['Product2Id'].astype(str).str.replace('#','', regex=False)
    orders['ProductName_clean'] = orders['ProductName'].astype(str).str.strip()
    filt = orders[(orders['AccountId_clean']==acct) & (orders['ProductName_clean'].str.contains('AI', case=False, na=False))]
    prod_id = None
    if not filt.empty:
        # prefer exact AI processing unit-ish by choosing product with AI in name and earliest date in last month, stable
        filt = filt.sort_values(['EffectiveDate','ProductName_clean','Product2Id_clean'])
        prod_id = filt.iloc[0]['Product2Id_clean']
else:
